{{Alo inversion}}Familial Metaphors for ALO are used to demonstrate all the various elements as being familial and familiar.

They were more common in [[2021]] when genealogy was a more important element of [[Lifeism]].

They are used in rituals mainly of the [[Alpha Covenant]]

All of them begin with (inclusive) Our 

In translations to other languages it is preferable to make them gender neutral, with an inclusive Our, and somehow preserve the pun of whatever the earliest Grandfather or latest grandson would be. 

* [[Alpha]]
** [[Our Greatest Grandfather]]
* [[Lambda]]
** [[Our Greatest Brother]]
** [[Our Greatest Granduncle]]
** [[Our Greatest Husband]]
* [[Omega]]
** [[Our Greatest Grandson]]

[[Category:Familial Metaphors for ALO]]
[[sn:Familial Metaphors for ALO]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Familial Metaphors for ALO]][[sn:Familial Metaphors for ALO]][[Category:Family]]
[[sn:Familial Metaphors for ALO]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
